tagline: Family-owned, ASE-trained auto repair for all makes and models in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Family-owned auto repair in Santa Rosa, CA. ASE-trained techs service domestic and import cars, with a 2-year/24K-mile warranty.
heroSubheading: A family-owned, full-service maintenance and repair shop in Santa Rosa with ASE-trained technicians who service all makes and models, foreign and domestic.
aboutBody: Rincon Valley Auto Repair is a family-owned and operated, full-service maintenance and repair facility in Santa Rosa. Our ASE-trained technicians service and repair all makes and models of both domestic and imported vehicles, and we take pride in delivering excellent service and quality repairs at a reasonable cost.

We focus on preventing problems rather than just repairing them, so you spend less over the life of your vehicle. Every repair is backed by a 2-Year/24,000-Mile warranty, and our waiting room offers free Wi-Fi. We also offer financing and after-hours drop-off to make service easy.

services.title: Computer Diagnostics
services.description: We use computer diagnostics to pinpoint check-engine lights and electronic issues accurately.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.description: Complete brake inspection, repair, and service to keep your vehicle stopping safely.

services.title: Steering & Suspension
services.description: Repair and service of steering and suspension components for a smooth, controlled ride.

services.title: Transmission Repair
services.description: Transmission diagnosis and repair for both domestic and imported vehicles.

services.title: Preventative Maintenance
services.description: Full-service maintenance aimed at preventing problems before they become costly repairs.

testimonials.quote: Their communication and expertise can't be praised enough.
testimonials.author: Kole C.

testimonials.quote: Competitive prices. Knowledgeable. Clean facilities. Thorough.
testimonials.author: Mark S.

testimonials.quote: Ray quickly fixed the issue. The mechanics are all very nice.
testimonials.author: Georgia S.

notes: Address: 4785 Sonoma Highway, Santa Rosa, CA 95409. Phone (707) 791-3960. Email rinconvalleyautorepair@gmail.com (from brief; not displayed on site). Founding year NOT confirmed — BBB lists business start as 6/3/2024 but that likely reflects the BBB profile date, not actual founding, so 'established' left empty. Rating 4.5 / 12 reviews per Yahoo Local; Yelp shows ~13 reviews and a high rating but was 403/blocked so not used as the source. Owner appears to be named Ray (per reviews) — not officially confirmed on site. Amenities confirmed on site: 2yr/24k warranty, free Wi-Fi, financing, after-hours drop-off. Only 2 distinct real photos found on their CDN (staff and mechanic), both verified HTTP 200.
